title: Snow Rider
description: Race down snowy slopes in Snow Rider! Dodge obstacles, collect gifts, and enjoy fast-paced winter fun.
instructions: Use arrow keys or swipe to move left and right. Avoid obstacles and keep riding as far as possible.
tips: Stay in the middle of the track when obstacles are dense for better reaction time.

title: Charger City Driver
description: Charger City Driver puts you behind the wheel of a powerful car in a bustling city. Drive freely, explore the streets, and test your driving skills with speed and precision.
instructions: Use WASD or arrow keys to drive. Press Space to brake. Explore the city, drift around corners, and show off your driving skills.
tips: Practice drifting for tighter turns. Explore shortcuts around the city to save time. Control your speed when driving through crowded areas.
